title: goniophlebium ciliatum
intro: Goniophlebium ciliatum, also known as the ciliate goniophlebium, is a species of fern native to the tropical forests of the Pacific Islands. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Goniophlebium ciliatum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared into herbal remedies like infusions, tinctures, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
